title: St Patricks Happy Animals
description: Play the newest St Patricks puzzle game called St Patricks Happy Animals. The game has 10 levels with 10 images of funny animals prepared for St Patricks Day. You have to solve the puzzle by clicking on the parts of the image, rotating them, and bringing them to the right place. Watch the time and be very fast because it is counting down. Enjoy and have fun!!!
instructions: Use the mouse to play this game for desktop Click on the screen to rotate for touch screens
